# GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension · Claim Boundary Firewall v22

Status: ready for production deployment.

## Addition

Adds `/claim-boundary-firewall.html`, a browser-local public demonstration of GoalOS claim discipline. Users choose a public-safe claim, run the Verifier Mesh, inspect claim-promotion gates, and download a public-safe Evidence Docket JSON.

## Why it matters

This page demonstrates the rule that public claims do not advance because they sound impressive. They advance only after evidence, contradiction coverage, risk state, replay path, public/private boundary, and human review are visible.

## Safety posture

No account, no form tag, no cookies, no analytics, no browser storage, no wallet connection, no network request, no token route, no transaction broadcast, no production authority, and no user data wanted.

## Local verification

The package was checked with repository tests, page-specific tests, zero-network checks, static build, and the Claim Boundary Firewall kernel.
